name: ghostty
title: Ghostty
description: Launch windows, create tabs, open workspaces, run launch configurations, and manage Ghostty on Linux.
author: domainus

commands.name: new-ghostty-tab
commands.title: New Ghostty Tab
commands.description: Create a new tab in the current Ghostty window using the configured Ctrl+Shift+T shortcut

commands.name: search-ghostty-tab
commands.title: Focus Ghostty Window
commands.subtitle: Ghostty
commands.description: List visible Ghostty windows and focus the selected one

commands.name: open-ghostty-launch-configuration
commands.title: Open Ghostty Launch Configuration
commands.description: Open Ghostty with a saved YAML launch configuration

commands.name: open-ghostty-workspace
commands.title: Open Ghostty Workspace
commands.description: Find Git repositories and open them in Ghostty or with a launch configuration

commands.name: view-ghostty-config
commands.title: Manage Ghostty Config
commands.description: View, edit, validate, and open the Ghostty configuration file

preferences.name: workspaceParentDirectory
preferences.title: Workspaces Parent Directory
preferences.description: Directory to scan for Git repositories

preferences.name: workspaceScanDepth
preferences.title: Workspace Scan Depth
preferences.description: Max depth to scan for git repositories

scripts.pretest: tsc --outDir dist --module commonjs --target ES2022 --jsx react-jsx --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/lib.ts
